name: gorilla_chr6_centromere
description: Gorilla gorilla chr6 centromere / pericentromere. Alpha-satellite higher-order repeat (HOR) array; 10-monomer HOR unit (~1710 bp). T2T-resolved alpha-sat array; flanked by ape-lineage GORSAT satellite blocks. Centromere mapping is HOR-aware; LLmap should refuse to silently collapse cross-species divergence here.
expected_copy_count: thousands of 171 bp alpha-satellite monomers in 10-mer HOR units, tandemly arrayed over 2.9 Mb
